summary: Validated Milestone A reproducibility tooling and backend regression suite. make cpp-deterministic and make reproducibility-check pass; reproducibility scripts produce deterministic outputs. CI workflow YAML parses successfully after build-hermetic additions. Runtime curl checks for /health and /api/version could not run because no server is listening on 127.0.0.1:8000 in this container.

critical.issue: Direct runtime checks failed: connection refused on 127.0.0.1:8000 (service not running in this environment)

minor.issue: tests/test_auth_dashboard.py is entirely skipped because BACKEND_BASE_URL env var is unset
Fails under this container because Python is 3.11.14; script expects 3.12.x in strict mode
Cannot execute here because docker binary is missing in runtime container

action_items: Provide/restore runtime backend service exposure for endpoint-level smoke checks in this environment
Set BACKEND_BASE_URL in CI/local test env so auth/dashboard regression file does not skip
Keep build-hermetic checks on Python 3.12 runners; strict host variance will fail on 3.11 environments by design
critical_code_review_comments: test_auth_dashboard.py currently hard-depends on BACKEND_BASE_URL and silently skips all coverage when unset; this can mask regressions in auth/dashboard unless env is guaranteed in pipelines.
Hermetic validation scripts are correct structurally, but local container lacks docker+nix so those checks are not executable here; ensure CI remains the enforcement point.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reproducibility and make targets passed locally; full pytest suite passed (305) with 15 skips. Added TestClient regression file for /health, /api/version, auth login->me->dashboard flow. Runtime curl checks still blocked by no service on :8000.
rca of the issue: Primary blockers are environment/runtime, not code logic: (1) no backend process bound to 127.0.0.1:8000 caused runtime endpoint smoke failures, (2) BACKEND_BASE_URL missing caused auth/dashboard endpoint integration tests to skip, (3) docker/nix binaries absent in this container prevent local execution of hermetic container checks.
